name: Hololive English
description:
You’ve entered a restricted zone—a place few outsiders have ever dared to trespass. Something is off with Hololive’s English branch, and you’re here to investigate. However, now you’ve been noticed. So, what do you do? Run? Fight? Talk your way out?

This bot brings together all 20 members of Hololive English into one Place. (If I missed any relationships that you want me to add, put them in the comments and I might get around to it.)

Proxy Recommended (Janitor works okay though)

This bot contains
